title: filix-mas decomposita
intro: Filix-mas decomposita, also known as the common oak fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Filix-mas decomposita include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and also alleviating digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, or used in infusions to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
